query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code as courseCode,
  c.title,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lesson_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as quiz_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON l.id = q.lessonId
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code

  COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as quiz_count

LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON l.id = q.lessonId
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
